fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: West Virginia Pharmacy Technician License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacy technician? Here's whether your license transfers to West Virginia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacy technician license reciprocity west virginia, how to transfer pharmacy technician license to west virginia, pharmacy technician compact west virginia, west virginia pharmacy technician endorsement application

license_types.title: Certified Pharmacy Technician (CPhT)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacy technician in West Virginia.

steps.title: Complete the Application
steps.description: Submit a complete application for license as a pharmacy technician to the West Virginia Board of Pharmacy.

steps.title: Pay the Required Fee
steps.description: Submit the required license fee of $100 to the West Virginia Board of Pharmacy.

steps.title: Complete Continuing Education
steps.description: Complete 5 hours of continuing education every two years to maintain active license.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the PTCB. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacy Technicians licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a West Virginia pharmacy technician license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does West Virginia have reciprocity for pharmacy technicians?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacy technician practice in West Virginia. To work in West Virginia, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacy technician license to West Virginia?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in West Virginia while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacy Technicians licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacy Technician in West Virginia
hero.dek: West Virginia Pharmacy Technician licensure requires submitting an application, paying a fee, and completing continuing education.
